items.name: X2 Dual Blade Cutter
items.note: Clean, even cuts with lifetime warranty — a reliable everyday cutter.

items.name: V-Cut Cigar Cutter
items.note: Concentrates the draw with a deep V notch — popular with fuller-bodied smokes.

items.name: Credo Synchro Cut
items.note: Scissor-style cut with a controlled close — good for ring gauges up to 54.

items.name: Forb Soft Flame
items.note: Classic soft flame for a gentle toast — easy to control on windless evenings.

items.name: Triple Torch Lighter
items.note: Hot, focused torch for denser cigars and outdoor lighting.

items.name: Tabletop Quad Torch
items.note: Stable table lighter for lounge nights — fuel type and finish vary by shipment.

items.name: Boveda 65% 60g
items.note: Set-and-forget humidity control for travel humidors and small desktop boxes.

items.name: 5-Count Travel Humidor
items.note: Protects a short rotation on the road — fits easily in a bag or glove box.

items.name: 25-Count Desktop Humidor
items.note: Glass-top desktop box with hygrometer — ask staff which finish is on the shelf.

items.name: Ceramic Cigar Rest
items.note: Stable rest for lounge nights — ask about colors currently on the shelf.

items.name: Punch & Tool Kit
items.note: Punches, picks, and pocket tools rotate often — staff will show what is in stock.

items.name: Draw Poker Tool
items.note: Clears a tight draw without shredding the filler — pocket-friendly size.
